form.formComment: Failed to impress last start; 5th (20m Fr5) over 2138m at this track beaten 5.5 m by Lain (2:44.80) in 3yo+ NR up to 45 on March 27 at $3.90. Showed ability the race before when she won by 1.5 m after showing early speed, (Fr2) at this track (2:38.00) beating Ignite in 3yo+ NR up to 45 on March 20 at $3.90. Has a low draw and is a leading player on best form.
